notice_sections.action_statement: We have taken the following action on your application: DENIED

key_factors: Serious delinquency, derogatory public record, or collection filed
Proportion of balances to credit limits too high on bank revolving or other revolving accounts
Too many recent inquiries in the last 12 months

notice_sections.ecoa_statement: The federal Equal Credit Opportunity Act prohibits creditors from discriminating against credit applicants on the basis of race, color, religion, national origin, sex, marital status, age, because all or part of the applicant's income derives from any public assistance program, or because the applicant has in good faith exercised any right under the Consumer Credit Protection Act. The federal agency that administers compliance with this law concerning this creditor is: [Insert applicable federal agency].

fcra_rights.dispute_statement: If you find that any information in the consumer report used in making this credit decision is inaccurate, you have the right to dispute the matter with the reporting agency.
fcra_rights.free_copy_statement: You have the right to obtain a free copy of your consumer report from the consumer reporting agency named above, if you request it no later than 60 days after you receive this notice.

notice_sections.header: First National Bank -- Adverse Action Notice

reasons.description: Serious delinquency, derogatory public record, or collection filed
Proportion of balances to credit limits too high on bank revolving or other revolving accounts
Too many recent inquiries in the last 12 months

output.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted. Use synthetic placeholders only.

receipt_metadata.anchor_recommendation: Anchor this execution receipt at anchor.ainumbers.co to create durable, timestamped evidence per Reg B §1002.12(b)(4)
receipt_metadata.retention_requirement: ECOA Reg B §1002.12: 25-month record retention for credit application files

output.regulatory_basis: Reg B §1002.9 (12 CFR Part 1002); ECOA 15 USC §1691c; FCRA §615(a) 15 USC §1681m; CFPB Circular 2022-03; CFPB Circular 2023-03

resolved_reasons.description: Serious delinquency, derogatory public record, or collection filed
Proportion of balances to credit limits too high on bank revolving or other revolving accounts
Too many recent inquiries in the last 12 months

output.table_source: CFPB Circular 2022-03 (Aug 2022); CFPB Circular 2023-03 (Sep 2023); FICO public reason codes (myFICO.com); VantageScore public reason codes (vantagescore.com)
